item.title: Six more children die with measles-like symptoms across Bangladesh in 24 hours
item.description: Six children died with measles symptoms across the country in the 24 hours until 8:00am on Monday, pushing the number of suspected measles-related deaths to 350 since March 15, according to the Directorate General of Health Services....
